title: SIR, yes SIR: How voter deletions impacted West Bengal elections
content: West Bengal witnessed a significant political shift as the BJP formed its first government, largely influenced by the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls. This exercise, which removed nearly 12% of voters, disproportionately affected minority communities and became a central, contentious issue, reshaping voting trends and contributing to the BJP's surge across the state.

title: TVK's Vijay to take oath as CM on May 7 - short of majority, how will he form govt?
content: TVK chief Vijay will be sworn in as Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister on May 7, securing 108 seats. Despite falling short of a majority, the party plans to seek support from smaller allies to form the government. Vijay has received congratulations from Rahul Gandhi and Prime Minister Narendra Modi, expressing commitment to public welfare and state progress.

title: Palantir CEO may have just told every US what to do and what not to do with AI
content: Palantir CEO Alex Karp urges AI companies to abandon "AI slop" and focus on functional software services, citing the company's significant growth driven by demand for its platform. He contrasts Palantir's "actual results" rooted in data with low-quality AI content, emphasizing the platform's impact on essential infrastructure and the battlefield.

title: Warner questions PSL 'Team of the Year' selections as Babar Azam named captain
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) announced the team on Monday. Babar Azam was named captain after leading Peshawar Zalmi to the title and performing well with the bat.

title: Veteran producer RB Choudhary dies in crash; Rajinikanth mourns loss
content: Veteran film producer RB Choudary has died in a fatal car crash near Udaipur on Tuesday. Reports suggest the accident took place around 3 pm. The exact cause of the crash and the condition of others involved are yet to be confirmed. Condolences have begun pouring in from across the film fraternity. Superstar Rajinikanth also mourned his demise.

title: After OpenAI raised over $4bn; Anthropic announces partnership with Blackstone & others
content: AI giants OpenAI and Anthropic are intensifying their competition by launching new ventures aimed at boosting enterprise AI adoption. Both companies have secured significant funding from major financial institutions to help businesses integrate their AI tools into daily operations. This strategic move prioritizes real-world usage and revenue growth as both firms reportedly explore public listings.

title: How India-New Zealand FTA creates new global pathways for Indian talent
content: The India-New Zealand FTA highlights that the provisions on student mobility, professional pathways, working holiday visa creates an unprecedented opportunity for Indian youth and professionals to gain global exposure.

title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong in layoff email to employees: I have watched engineers use AI tools
content: Coinbase is cutting about 14% of its global workforce, impacting around 700 jobs. This move is driven by the evolving role of artificial intelligence in operations and ongoing crypto market fluctuations. The company aims to streamline its structure and enhance efficiency. Restructuring is expected to conclude by the second quarter of 2026.

title: Why was the West Bengal verdict set in stone?
content: What began in 2011 as a movement against the Left Front’s stagnation had, by 2026, come full circle. Mamata Banerjee had once represented disruption and hope. Over time, her regime became associated with a different vocabulary. Words like “cut money”, “syndicate control”, and “tolabazi” became shorthand for everyday governance failures. This was not merely opposition rhetoric, it was a lived experience. From construction projects to small household repairs, local syndicates were perceived to control economic activity.

title: Travis Kelce plans comeback after Raiders beat Chiefs, with Mahomes factor
content: Travis Kelce will play for the Kansas City Chiefs for three more seasons. This decision shocked everyone who thought he would retire. Travis Kelce informed head coach Andy Reid and general manager Brett Veach of his decision after the team’s final game against the Las Vegas Raiders. He wants to support quarterback Patrick Mahomes during his ACL recovery. He values friendship above everything.

title: Apex Legends Season 29: Start date and timings for all regions
content: Apex Legends' Season 29, 'Overclocked,' launches May 5, 2026, bringing exciting new content. Players can anticipate the arrival of Axle, a swift Skirmisher legend focused on slide mechanics, and the innovative Deathbox Respawns feature, allowing teammates to be revived directly at their fallen comrades' deathboxes. This update promises a fresh experience for the popular battle royale.

title: Novak Djokovic wife Jelena Djokovic shares message before Italian Open
content: Novak Djokovic is finally ready to return to action at the Italian Open after a long injury break. The Serbian star had been away from the court since the Indian Wells Open due to a shoulder problem. His comeback in Rome is important as he prepares for the clay season. The 24-time Grand Slam winner will enter the tournament as the third seed.

title: How to download Minecraft Bedrock 26.30.25/26 beta version
content: Minecraft Bedrock 26.30.25/26 beta and preview is now available, featuring content from the upcoming Chaos Cubed update, including Sulfur Cube Archetypes and Geysers. This beta allows players to test new features before their official release. The article details how to download and install the beta on PC, Xbox, PlayStation, Android, and iOS devices.

title: Centre bolsters Supreme Court: Strength of judges increased from 33 to 37
content: The PM Modi-chaired Cabinet meeting approved the proposal for introducing The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Bill, 2026 in Parliament to amend The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1956 for increasing the number. The Constitution leaves the size of the Supreme Court open-ended. Article 124(1) provides for a Chief Justice of India and permits Parliament to determine the number of other judges through legislation.

title: T20 success not enough for 'respect': Manjrekar sets challenge for Sooryavanshi
content: His performances have led to discussions about whether he could be selected for the India team after the IPL, and Manjrekar said he has done enough to be considered.

title: Carlsen suffers first classical chess loss since table-slam outburst vs Gukesh
content: World No. 1 and five-time world  Magnus Carlsen suffered his first classical chess defeat in nearly a year after losing to Jorden van Foreest at the TePe Sigeman & Co Tournament 2026 in Malmo. Carlsen had remained unbeaten since his loss to D Gukesh in 2025. Arjun Erigaisi stayed unbeaten after drawing with Nodirbek Abdusattorov.

title: 7 silent warning signs that may mean you need a Cerebral Angiography
content: Subtle symptoms like sudden headaches or vision blur could signal serious brain vascular issues. Cerebral angiography, a specialized imaging test, maps brain blood flow, acting as the gold standard for diagnosing conditions like stroke and aneurysms. This vital procedure can even offer real-time treatment, underscoring the importance of heeding warning signs for timely intervention and brain health protection.

title: 'Anga, Banga, Kalinga': BJP completes eastern arc with Bengal victory
content: The BJP has achieved a significant milestone by securing a victory in West Bengal in 2026, completing its symbolic arc across eastern India with control in Bihar, Bengal, and Odisha. This win consolidates a long-standing political project, marking a sharp turnaround for the party after a Lok Sabha setback and expanding its national reach.

title: Trisha’s old ‘CM’ remark resurfaces after Vijay’s big win
content: Actress Trisha Krishnan's old interview clip has resurfaced and is trending online. In the 2004 video, she jokingly spoke about becoming a chief minister. This has sparked nostalgia and amusement among fans, especially after Thalapathy Vijay's recent election victory. The clip highlights Trisha's early career charm. Meanwhile, Trisha is awaiting the release of her upcoming film 'Karuppu' with Suriya.

title: Rohit's injury absence cost MI, says Harbhajan after win over LSG
content: Harbhajan Singh said Rohit Sharma’s earlier return from injury could have improved Mumbai Indians’ IPL 2026 campaign. Rohit’s match-winning knock against Lucknow Super Giants highlighted his importance to the side. Harbhajan felt MI lost crucial matches during Rohit’s absence but believes the team still has an outside chance of reaching the playoffs.

title: IPL 2026: Why the mighty Mumbai Indians are in desperate need of an overhaul
content: Wholesome changes are needed at the Mumbai Indians after yet another underwhelming IPL season. It's high time the management makes the tough calls on players whose personal interests and ambition do not contribute to the team's cause. The next mega auction is an opportunity for the franchise to fix the mistakes made at the auction table, but the immediate need is to set the house in order and restore normalcy in the dressing room.

title: Blockbuster debut! Vijay Tamil Nadu's Gen-nayagan
content: Tamil Nadu's political landscape is witnessing the rise of a new superstar in actor Vijay, mirroring MGR's trajectory. Despite a contrasting on-screen persona, Vijay's unconventional campaign, leveraging social media and a direct voter appeal, has positioned him as a formidable force. He has emerged from the shadows of established parties, capturing public imagination and potentially reshaping the state's political future.

title: Highly qualified, not dependent: HC denies maintenance to wife with Rs 31 lakh income
content: The dispute arose from matrimonial proceedings between two highly qualified medical professionals. The wife, a practicing gynaecologist with an M.D. degree, challenged a trial court order which had partly rejected her application for maintenance under Sections 24 and 26 of the Hindu Marriage Act, 1955.

title: ‘You’re one of the OGs’: Virat Kohli’s heartfelt tribute for RCB stalwart - Watch
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru bid an emotional farewell to former head physio Evan Speechly after his 18-year association with the franchise.  Virat Kohli and Director of Cricket Mo Bobat led tributes, highlighting Speechly's professionalism, kindness, and dedication. Speechly expressed his gratitude, calling RCB family and feeling fortunate for his long tenure.

title: West Bengal election: The 'sun sets' for Mamata Banerjee
content: The Bharatiya Janata Party has achieved a historic victory in West Bengal, securing a landslide win and ending Mamata Banerjee's 15-year reign. The BJP claimed every seat in nine districts, including Purba Medinipur and the northern hills, signaling a significant shift in the state's political landscape. This triumph marks the BJP's first time in power in West Bengal.

title: Lest you forget: The promises made by TVK that helped it claim victory
content: Tamilaga Vetri Kazhagam's manifesto, spanning 94 pages, outlines comprehensive promises for Tamil Nadu voters. Key pledges include monthly financial aid for women, free bus rides, and healthcare initiatives. The party also committed to youth development, farmer support, police reforms, and economic revival for MSMEs and weavers.

title: IPL: Will Lungi Ngidi play vs CSK today? Munaf Patel gives major fitness update
content: Delhi Capitals bowler Lungi Ngidi is fit for the IPL 2026 match against Chennai Super Kings. Bowling coach Munaf Patel confirmed Ngidi's availability. Delhi Capitals need to win this crucial game to stay in playoff contention. Early wickets are vital against Chennai Super Kings. The team is likely to maintain selection continuity.

title: Over $30/barrel discount: Iraq cuts crude prices, but buyers beware!
content: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has been severely disrupted since the conflict escalated toward the end of February, and renewed clashes between the US and Iran on Monday have raised fresh concerns.

title: Mamata 'Bye'-nerjee: BJP tide leaves Bengal's big fish out of water
content: Bengal has witnessed a seismic political shift as the BJP surged to power, unseating Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress after 15 years. The saffron party secured a decisive victory, breaching the majority mark and fulfilling Amit Shah's ambitious target. This marks a significant change in the state's political landscape, ending decades of Left and TMC dominance.

title: 'I am their next target': Raghav Chadha alleges 'vendetta politics' by Punjab govt
content: Rajya Sabha member Raghav Chadha accused the AAP-led Punjab government of using state machinery for political vendetta against MPs who joined the BJP. He alleged selective targeting through various agencies, presenting these concerns to the President. Another rebel MP, Sandeep Pathak, stated they sought constitutional safeguards from the President, who assured protection.

title: IPL: What’s gone wrong for LSG? Pant’s form, captaincy, batting woes derail campaign
content: Lucknow Super Giants face a dire IPL 2026 season, reeling from six consecutive losses and languishing at the bottom. Captain Rishabh Pant's form and leadership are under scrutiny, while batting collapses and inconsistent bowling plague the team. With playoff hopes fading, LSG desperately needs an extraordinary turnaround to salvage their campaign.

title: Anand Mahindra shares images of Thar-based Military ATV, gets stunning mods
content: Mahindra Group has unveiled a rugged new all-terrain vehicle (ATV) for defence forces, built on the Thar Roxx platform. This mission-ready machine boasts a stripped-down, open design with a tubular roll cage, heavy-duty bumper, and modular storage. Airdrop-ready, it promises resilience and adaptability for any terrain, reflecting Mahindra's core philosophy.

title: India among most resilient large EMs, better placed for future global shocks: Moody’s
content: In its latest study on emerging-market sovereigns, the agency notes that India has ranked among the more resilient economies since 2020, based on multiple indicators such as sovereign bond spreads, domestic yield movements, and exchange-rate stability.

title: Assam elections 2026: How have smaller allies fared?
content: The Opposition’s ‘three Gogoi’ formula to counter the BJP failed as both Congress state chief Gaurav Gogoi and AJP chief Gogoi lost from their respective seats in Jorhat and Khowang.

title: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu unveils NABARD credit plan of ₹5.11 lakh crore for 2026–27 fiscal
content: Significant push for horticulture development in Rayalaseema and Prakasam districts with a sum of ₹5,313 crore specifically allocated for the purpose

title: Cabinet approves four more judges for Supreme Court
content: The move is a step towards tiding over the continuing crisis of pendency plaguing the court; this will increase the current Supreme Court strength from the present 34 judges to 38

title: Assembly election 2026 results LIVE: TVK seeks Congress support to form govt, final decision with State unit, says K.C. Venugopal
content: TMC supremo Mamata Banerjee on May 5 ruled out stepping down as Chief Minister, alleging that the West Bengal Assembly poll result was "not a people’s mandate but a conspiracy"

title: Tiruchi orthography researchers decipher ancient inscription in Courtrallam hill cave
content: After two-and-a-half years of research, K. Balakrishnan and Mathur B. Pavendan have deciphered an inscription in Sanyasi Pudavu in Courtrallam hills in Tenkasi district

title: Raghuram Rajan advises youth to hone skills for gainful employment
content: The RBI former Governor was particular about the ease of doing business policies that should be adopted as they form the basis for attracting new industries and investments to the State, he urged government to vigorously promote startups

title: Dominance across two regions helps BJP-led bloc secure landslide victory | Data
content: The BJP-led North-East Democratic Alliance wins 102 of 126 seats, while the Congress-led Asom Sonmilito Morcha is reduced to 21; AIUDF secures two seats and the Trinamool Congress one

title: Assembly poll 2026: CPI(M) commences post-poll debacle stock-taking exercise as it realises there is no magic bullet
content: The debilitating rout, especially in the party’s strongholds, has thrown up some big questions regarding the party’s campaign strategy, organisational cohesiveness, candidate finalisation, and efficacy of its political operations, including whether “misplaced confidence” of an “inevitable” third consecutive term in power had imbued the party’s electioneering with complacency from the booth level and upwards

title: Assembly polls outcome a caution to Congress to set house in order in Karnataka
content: Analysts note that broader voter consolidation, including among majority communities, can play a crucial role in determining outcomes in Assembly elections

title: TVK changes Tamil Nadu’s political landscape | Data
content: Actor C. Joseph Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam has, in its electoral debut, decimated the DMK’s seat base in the urban heartlands where the ruling party had been strongest. The AIADMK held its ground in the west and north through coalition cohesion, and the DMK clung on best in its delta heartland.

title: 2026 Assam Assembly elections at a glance
content: The BJP won 82 of 126 seats, asserting their dominance in the State’s political landscape. Altogether, the BJP-led NEDA has swept the elections by winning 102 seats and the Congress-led Asom Sonmilito Morcha has secured 21 seats.

title: Watch: Mamata Banerjee refuses to resign, rejects poll defeat | Above the Fold | 05.05.2026
content: From post-election power plays and West Asia tensions impacting Indians to Raghav Chadha’s appeal to the President, and a deadly virus outbreak at sea - Top news of the day.

title: Lokesh to lay stone for Carrier Global’s ₹1,000-crore facility in Sri City on May 6
content: It helps bring advanced cooling technologies that are indispensable for the next-generation growth engines such as data centres, AI infrastructure and high-performance computing environment

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: People rejected false allegations, says O.J. Janeesh after Kodungalloor win
content: Youth Congress leader hits out at CPI(M), credits UDF surge to public awareness and anti-incumbency mood

title: CPI(M) to discuss reasons for LDF poll debacle in Kozhikode, Cong. to examine Beypore defeat
content: The UDF won 12 of the 13 segments in Kozhikode when the Assembly election results were declared on May 4, 2026. The LDF’s victory was confined to Beypore, from where former Public Works Minister P.A. Mohamed Riyas managed to win

title: Raging speculation about Congress’ CM-designate consumes the party in Kerala
content: Veteran A.K. Antony signalled that the names of party general secretary K.C. Venugopal, Leader of the Opposition in Kerala Assembly V D Satheesan, and senior leader Ramesh Chennithala were in play for the Congress Chief Minister’s post

title: Belagavi ZP to strengthen Yoga, AYUSH practices in all schools
content: The ZP CEO has instructed district AYUSH officers and taluk level officers to strengthen these practices by training physical education teachers

title: Vietnamese President To Lam visits Bihar's Gaya Ji
content: Former Bihar legislative Assembly speaker Prem Kumar, who represents the Gaya Town constituency, said it was a matter of pride that the Vietnamese President had visited "this land of knowledge".

title: Cine exhibitors seek bailout package for single-screen theatres in Andhra Pradesh
content: Stating that many theatres are on the verge of closure due to competition from multiplexes and growing impact of OTT platforms, they urge Cinematography Minister Kandula Durgesh to extend them, among others, relief from commercial electricity tariffs and reduction in municipal property taxes

title: The BJP wins big in West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026: Results at a glance
content: After winning 206 (of 294) Assembly seats in West Bengal, the BJP is set to form a government in the State for the first time. Here are the results, with supporting graphics, at a glance

title: Chemicals giant BASF’s Global Service Hub, Global Digital Hub in Hyderabad soon
content: BASF joins a league of extraordinary global peers that have chosen Hyderabad as a strategic base for their most critical operations: Telangana IT and Industries Minister Sridhar Babu

title: ‘Anti-worker’ stance of govt. played a part in poll defeat, says ASHAs forum
content: KAHWA says that the devastating defeat handed over to the LDF should serve as a strong warning to any government that forgets that their mandate is to serve the people

title: Rural sweep and urban gains set the BJP up for a decisive majority in West Bengal | Data
content: The BJP’s breach of West Bengal has been built on a sweep of the agrarian South West, marked improvement in Greater Kolkata, the fracture of the AITC’s minority base alongside Hindutva support, besides strong performance in reserved seats.

title: Informant in POCSO case against Jyotirmath Shankaracharya moves HC against police history-sheet
content: In his plea, Ashutosh Brahmachari says that either he got acquitted or the trial remains stayed in most of the cases filed against him. In February, he moved a court for registration of FIR against Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati, alleging that he molested two minors in his Ashram.

title: Badvel-Nellore stretch of NH 67 likely to finish in next three years, says NHAI official
content: The four-laning and six-laning works of the NH 67 project, which starts at Ramnagar in Belagavi, have been completed in many parts of Karnataka, but the four-laning works between Badvel and Nellore has been delayed due to pending wildlife clearance and disbursement of compensation to farmers

title: K.M. Abraham resigns as CEO of Kerala Infrastructure Investment Fund Board
content: The resignation comes a day after the UDF victory in the 2026 Assembly elections. Mini Antony, Additional CEO, will hold charge of KIIFB for the time being

title: Bihar Cabinet expansion on May 7, says BJP
content: Sources said most Ministers from the Nitish Kumar-led NDA government are likely to be retained, and a few fresh faces will be introduced to fill all the 36 Cabinet berths

title: Siddalinga Swami says there’s severe water crisis, governance failure in Jewargi
content: The State president of Sri Ram Sene has said that residents have been struggling for years without assured access to potable water

title: How Vijay built a grassroots base even before launching TVK
content: Over the years, Mr. Vijay has implemented several welfare measures and extended support to regional and national political causes

title: In Assam, BJP wave topples sons of three former CMs
content: This election not only solidified the BJP’s dominance but also saw the defeat of the sons of three former Chief Ministers—Gaurav Gogoi, Debabrata Saikia, and Diganta Barman

title: "Robber Bride" Looted Eight Husbands. 9th Marriage Caused Her Downfall
content: The exploits of the 'robber bride', who had already been married eight times previously, came to light when she made a man from Beed's Umapur village her ninth victim.

title: 'Opportunity To Fix Economic Gap': Sanjeev Sanyal On BJP's Bengal Win
content: Sanyal pointed out that the state, once a major economic hub, has seen a long-term decline in its economic share.

title: Vijay's Big Hint In 2024 Movie: Drove Car With 'TN CM 2026' Number Plate
content: A short clip from the film has gone viral, wherein Vijay drives a car with the registration number TN 07 CM 2026 (TN stands for Tamil Nadu, CM stands for Chief Minister).

title: "Not Looking For Fight": US Warns Iran Of Forceful Response If Ships Attacked
content: Speaking on Tuesday, Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth stressed that Washington is not seeking escalation and that the current truce with Iran remains in place but drew a firm line on attacks against commercial vessels.

title: Cabinet Okays 2 New Semiconductor Units With Rs 3,936 Crore Investment
content: The semiconductor manufacturing facilities will be set up in Gujarat with a cumulative investment of about Rs 3,936 crore and are expected to generate cumulative employment for 2,230 skilled professionals.

title: "There Was No Hate Speech In Assam": Himanta Sarma To NDTV After BJP Hat-Trick
content: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma told NDTV his campaign was not at all divisive, but that many observers do not understand Assam's realities

title: Spain Logs Hottest April Since Records Began In 1961
content: Spain logged its hottest April since records began in 1961 with an average temperature of 15.1C last month, national weather agency AEMET said.

title: School Bullies To Face Caning Under New Guidelines In Singapore
content: Caning was discussed in Singapore's parliament on Tuesday after legislators asked how it would be used in relation to bullying in schools.

title: 5 UP Cops Killed After SUV Collides With Vehicle On Haryana Expressway
content: Nuh (Haryana), May 5 (IANS) Five Uttar Pradesh policemen were killed in a road mishap on Tuesday when a speeding SUV they were travelling in collided with another vehicle on the KMP Expressway in the Nuh district of Haryana, a police official said.

title: Madhya Pradesh Dalit Family Beaten With Sticks Over Temple Donation Refusal
content: Local strongmen allegedly reached the home of the victim and demanded wheat in the name of a temple donation.

title: Los Angeles' Zohran Mamdani? Indian-Origin Nithya Raman Shakes Up Mayor Race
content: Nithya Raman became the first Asian American woman and the first South Asian to sit on the Los Angeles City Council.

title: Infiltration, Fencing, CAA: What May Change In Bengal With BJP In Power
content: A major contentious issue between the Trinamool Congress government and the Centre was border fencing.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Mamata Banerjee Brought Down The Left, But Never Quite Learnt From Its Fall
content: The traits that served Mamata well when she swept the Left out of power in West Bengal in 2011 are the very ones that ultimately led to her downfall.

title: In Wayanad, A Leader Who Has Never Been Defeated Just Lost An Election
content: What makes this win unique is that a grassroots woman leader has managed to defeat a seasoned politician in a region where the CPM has held its sway for decades.

title: Mamata Banerjee refuses to resign, rejects poll defeat - what happens now?
content: Mamata banerjee says she will not be resigning . she alleges irregularities and signalling a multi-pronged political and legal response . a day after the sweeping victory in west Bengal, she refused to accept the verdict as a reflection of public mandate .

title: 'Smoke from bag, power bank on fire': Indigo flight evacuated at Chandigarh airport
content: smoke from a bag was detected when the aircraft had come to a halt and passengers were yet to disembark . the airline then decided to carry out immediate evacuation using emergency slides . everyone on board is learnt to be safe .

title: Welfare vs welfare: How BJP trumped Mamata’s ‘pro-woman’ appeal
content: saffron party embraced cash transfer schemes and outbid the BJP . if the TMC offered Rs 1,500 per month to general category women under its flagship Lakshmir Bhandar scheme, it promised Rs 3,000 . it also pledged 3,000 monthly assistance to unemployed youth and Rs 9,000 support for farmers .
